sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 82

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 82:1
items.html:
(to the question) The thickness of the line
At the time of the Ibur, when NHY were incorporated in HGT, these in those, the middle line grew thicker than the extremes; for those were merely doubled, while in the middle line three discernments were incorporated in one another, namely: Tifferet, Yesod, and Malchut. And it is known that Aviut [thickness] means Gevurot and Dinim; see Answer 28. (p. 764, Item 49)
